ddls:
CREATE TABLE "influenza_subtypes" (
  "subtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each influenza subtype */,
  "subtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the influenza subtype (e.g., H3N2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subtype */,
  "vaccine_strain" TEXT /* Indicates if the subtype is a vaccine strain */,
  "transmission_rate" REAL /* Average transmission rate of the subtype */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Average mortality rate associated with the subtype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subtype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., Any, 0.5-8, 9-17) */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the group (e.g., Any, 0.5-8 years) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population size of the age group */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population in the age group that is vaccinated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "infection_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each infection rate record */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the data is from */,
  "subtype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influenza subtype */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  "mean_rate" REAL /* Mean infection rate */,
  "low_95_ci" REAL /* Lower bound of the 95% confidence interval */,
  "high_95_ci" REAL /* Upper bound of the 95% confidence interval */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of individuals in the sample */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the confidence interval */,
  "seasonal_period" TEXT /* Seasonal period during which the data was collected */,
  "vaccination_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of the population in the age group that was vaccinated during the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infection_rates_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infection_rates_subtype_id FOREIGN KEY ("subtype_id") REFERENCES influenza_subtypes ("subtype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infection_rates_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the study */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary researcher */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "study_design" TEXT /* Design of the study */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Total number of participants in the study */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the study population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Research specialization (e.g., Virology, Epidemiology) */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Highest degree obtained by the researcher */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Global, North America) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population size of the region */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population in the region that is vaccinated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., Survey, Laboratory) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data source */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method of data collection */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_data_sources" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link record */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_source_version" TEXT /* Version of the data source used in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_data_sources_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_data_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the infection rate record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES infection_rates ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
